name: Training Continuous Chain of Thought Models: A Tale of Two Regimes

description: arXiv:2607.16972v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Continuous Chain-of-Thought methods replace verbose reasoning traces with a short sequence of dense latent representations. Earlier continuous CoT methods indirectly supervise the latent representations such that its final state match that of verbose reasoning traces, requiring autoregressive, slow generation during training. We introduce C-MTP, a...
author: Varun Yerram, He He, Eunsol Choi
